mapper.sql: id, user_id, order_number, amount, content, payment_status, payment_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO extra_charge_order (user_id, order_number, amount, content, payment_status, payment_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderNumber}, #{amount}, #{content}, #{paymentStatus}, #{paymentTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT eco.id, eco.user_id, eco.order_number, eco.amount, eco.content, eco.payment_status, eco.payment_time, eco.create_time, eco.update_time, u.username FROM extra_charge_order eco LEFT JOIN user u ON eco.user_id = u.id WHERE eco.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY eco.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT eco.id, eco.user_id, eco.order_number, eco.amount, eco.content, eco.payment_status, eco.payment_time, eco.create_time, eco.update_time, u.username FROM extra_charge_order eco LEFT JOIN user u ON eco.user_id = u.id ORDER BY eco.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE extra_charge_order SET payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM extra_charge_order WHERE payment_status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM extra_charge_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND payment_status = 0
SELECT FROM extra_charge_order WHERE payment_status = 0 AND create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
